title: Airlab Chamois Leathers for Cars 70x50cm 3500 cm² XXL, Real Shammy Leather for Windows, Large Chamois Car Cleaning Cloth Car Drying Towel for for Windscreen Glass Mirrors
features: GENUINE NATURAL LEATHER: The Airlab chamois leather is made from 100% genuine sheepskin, ensuring a high-quality and durable car care cloth that does not fluff. This genuine leather cloth can be cut to size as needed and has a slightly fishy odor that helps identify its authenticity
EXCELLENT ABSORBENCY: The Airlab chamois leather offers excellent absorbency, with a smooth surface and soft feel that makes it ideal for wet wiping, dusting, and polishing

MULTIPLE USE: The genuine leather chamois has an optimal size: 70x50 cm, for cleaning & drying large surfaces. It is very soft and anti-scratch, will not scratch your car and it is safe when cleaning all parts of the car or motorbike

CLEANING & MAINTENANCE: For cleaning and maintaining the leather chamois, it is recommended to avoid using boiling water and instead soak it in warm water for 10 minutes before wringing out excess water and shaping it to dry in a cool place. High temperature ironing should be avoided to preserve the quality of the leather

QUALITY GUARANTEE: Airlab offers a quality guarantee for their genuine leather chamois, with detailed usage instructions included in the packaging. If customers are not satisfied with the product, they are encouraged to contact Airlab immediately for assistance, as customer satisfaction is their top priority
description: Product Description Real Leather Unlike synthetic fibers, Airlab natural chamois is made of genuine sheep leather, which is ultra soft and anti-scratch with great extensibility Super Absorbent Our chamois removes water quickly and efficiently, absorbing up to 6x its weight and providing a streak-free finish Scratch Free Chamois is a very soft and thick type of leather that won't scratch any delicate surfaces. Perfect for car washing and drying Multipurpose Chamois Airlab Chamois not only can be used as a car drying towel, but is also ideal for cleaning motorcycles, boats, RVs, windows, screens, furniture, etc. Airlab Chamois Leather for Car Care Experience a New Level Of Cleaning With Chamois Nature's Original Chamois Airlab chamois stands out from other drying cloths for its consistently smooth finish, its soft touch and its professional detailing performance. What is Chamois? Chamois leather, also known as shammy, is a piece of lamb or sheep skin which is tanned using natural(marine) oils after having its grain removed. Why use chamois instead of microfiber? Chamois is a very soft and thick type of leather that is known for its super absorbent ability. It can absorb water that’s up to 6 times its weight. Because of how soft and non-abrasive the material is, it is most commonly used for Auto Care. Why does the chamois have a little fishy smell? Genuine chamois contains natural oils that make it soft and durable, so it’s normal to have a little fishy smell. The smell will disappear after several washes. It also serves to identify the real leather. How to prepare for using the chamois cloth? Before the first use of Chamois, wash the Chamois in warm soapy water, rinse the leather thoroughly afterward, and press the material to remove excess water. Don’t wring it, or it may tear the leather. Then lay it out to dry. How to care for Chamois？ After each use, rinse the Chamois well and dry it away from direct sunlight. Store it in a dry and cool place. Make sure to never use bleach or detergents to wash your chamois. About Responsibility At Airlab safety and social responsibility is paramount. We strive to provide you with safe products which have been ethically produced from the quality materials and with the lowest possible impact on the environment.
